title: The First Artifact
desc: Chaor leads you to Lava Pond where Magmon has been watching something grow in the rock.
chainDesc: Track an unknown threat across the UnderWorld alongside Chaor himself.

steps.text:
Lava Pond. The heat is staggering — rivers of molten rock carve the landscape into jagged black islands. Chaor walks through it like a park.

Magmon is waiting at the far shore, arms crossed. He doesn't acknowledge you at all. His report is for Chaor only.

"It's bigger than last time. Growing faster. I tried to burn it out but it just... absorbed the fire. Nothing I hit it with sticks." Magmon's voice is uneasy. Magmon is never uneasy.

Chaor turns to you. "Use your scanner. Find it."

You sweep the area. There — beneath thirty metres of volcanic rock. The same impossible signal, stronger now. Pulsing. Your scanner renders a shape: something like a coral formation, but with geometric precision no natural process could produce. Tendrils of it thread through the stone like roots.

options.label: Guide Chaor to the exact location with your scanner
Scan the perimeter for more of them

steps.text:
You point Chaor to the spot. He doesn't hesitate. He rears back and drives his fist into the volcanic rock like it's paper.

Three blows. Four. The ground splits open and there it is — a formation of dark, wet-looking material, threaded with veins that pulse with a faint bioluminescent glow. It's the colour of deep ocean water. Nothing in your database even comes close.

Chaor reaches in and rips it out of the stone. The tendrils snap, leaking fluid that evaporates on contact with the heat. In his massive hands, the thing looks almost fragile.

He stares at it. "This isn't Mugic. It's not technology. It's not natural." He crushes it. The fragments dissolve into vapor.

Magmon shifts. "There are more. I can feel them."

Chaor looks at your scanner readings. "Gothos Tower. That's where the next signal is strongest." He turns and walks. You follow.

options.label: Record everything and follow Chaor to Gothos Tower
